name: Konfig SDK Generation API
what_it_does: OpenAPI-based SDK generator and API publishing platform — automatically generating idiomatic SDKs in 10+ languages from OpenAPI specs, with API documentation hosting, SDK maintenance automation, and developer portal creation for API companies.
use_cases: Generating type-safe SDKs in 10+ languages from OpenAPI spec via CLI/API
Hosting API documentation with integrated code samples in all SDK languages
Automating SDK updates when OpenAPI spec changes in CI/CD pipeline
Publishing SDKs to package registries (npm, PyPI, RubyGems) via Konfig
Validating and linting OpenAPI specs for SDK generation compatibility
not_for: Simple API documentation without SDK generation needs
Non-OpenAPI API designs (GraphQL, gRPC — use different generators)
Fully custom SDK development beyond generated boilerplate
best_when: An API company wants to offer SDKs in multiple languages with automated maintenance, API documentation, and developer portal from a single OpenAPI spec.
avoid_when: You need only documentation (use ReadMe or Bump.sh), only one language SDK, or use non-OpenAPI API design.

auth.notes: API key from Konfig dashboard. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes. CLI-driven workflow with API for programmatic integration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; contact for pricing
pricing.notes: Enterprise pricing model. US-based YC startup (W23). Focused on API companies wanting to offer multi-language SDKs without manual maintenance. GitHub-based workflow for SDK PRs. Competes with Speakeasy and Stainless for automated SDK generation.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API and CLI for SDK generation, publishing, and documentation. API key auth. Workflow is primarily CLI + GitHub Actions based. API for programmatic access to generation pipeline. Early-stage startup — API evolving rapidly.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: SDK generation with same spec is deterministic but creates new artifacts. Documentation deployment idempotent by version. Read operations idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: CLI is primary interface — REST API is secondary for programmatic access
SDK generation requires valid OpenAPI spec — linting step recommended first
Package registry publishing requires pre-configured credentials per registry
YC startup — API surface evolving; check changelog before updates

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 certified. US data residency. API key auth. No scope granularity. Package registry credentials managed by Konfig — requires trust in credential handling. Standard startup security.
